title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BUAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PILAR, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO DEL ROSARIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5497 / 53 OG No. 16, 5149 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1728, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BUAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PILAR, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO DEL ROSARIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Bual in the Municipality of Pilar, Province of Sorsogon, is hereby changed to Del Rosario.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
